title: Phase 7: CLI (Query + Server)
description: Implement CLI with query mode (load, query, print, exit) and server mode (load once, serve HTTP queries). Python via Click+uvicorn, Rust via clap+axum. POST JSON dict-in/dict-out protocol. See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: CLI query mode done; make check green. Next: CLI server mode.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Status: closed (kbs does not accept 'done'). Done: CLI query + server modes implemented with Rust+Python steps and HTTP endpoints. Blockers: none.
